name: Ekko | A Prank Gone Too Far | April Fools!
description:
(Jinx!POV) (Ekko!BF) A prank gone too far

Ekko had just returned from a recent Firelight mission. His hoverboard was dirty, so he got out his specially made hoverboard cleaner he made himself, which smelled funny when he sprayed it on his board, but he brushed it off as exhaustion and the mix of smells from the mission that still clung to him. Then after a minute, the gold outer casing of his hoverboard starts coming off in sheets...
creator: Sir3nWhisp3rs
